text: Never miss a good chance to shut up and listen.
author: Will Rogers

text: It's no use going back to yesterday because I was a different person then.
author: Alice

text: Nothing comes from nothing; nothing ever could. Do something!
author: Richard Rodgers & Oscar Hammerstein II

text: Battles aren’t lost from fatigue; they’re lost from losing will.
author: Unattributed

text: Maybe midnight was the hour of answers.
author: Quiara Alegría Hudes

text: As a man dances, there are drums beaten for him.
author: Chinua Achebe

text: The greatest battles are fought in silence; in your soul.
author: Ezra Taft Benson

text: All great minds contain within them a touch of madness.
author: Aristotle

text: Fear of a name increases fear of the thing itself.
author: J.K. Rowling

text: Believe in yourself; you’re capable of more than you imagine.
author: Roy T. Bennett

text: Don't wish the work were easier. Wish you were better.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you want something valuable, you must give something valuable.
author: Unattributed

text: Lately, I find my mind considering an array of choices.
author: Demrezel

text: Even a soul submerged in sleep is hard at work.
author: Heraclitus

text: You can’t cross the sea by staring at the water.
author: Rabindranath Tagore

text: To succeed, planning alone is insufficient. One must improvise also.
author: Salvor Hardin

text: What I expect from you is to not give up.
author: @Theo WAF

text: We all make choices in life, but in the end, our choices make us.
author: Andrew Ryan

text: It always seems bad, but then I find a way.
author: Samurai Jack

text: Everybody falls the first time.
author: Cypher

text: You get used to it. I don't even see the code anymore.
author: Cypher

text: Perfection isn’t possible, but chasing it helps you catch excellence.
author: Vince Lombardi

text: It’s the question that drives you. It brought you here.
author: Trinity

text: It’s Christmas. We’re going to Applebee’s after this!
author: Bowery King

text: So be it. The path to paradise begins in hell.
author: The Director

text: If it doesn’t challenge you, then it doesn’t change you.
author: Jennifer Lau

text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated every day.
author: Robert Collier

text: The greatest loss is what dies inside while still alive.
author: Norman Cousins

text: Keep setting goals, push forward and choose discipline over comfort.
author: Chuck Norris

text: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

text: Success is achieved by ordinary people with extraordinary determination.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Perseverance is the hard work you do after you get tired of doing the hard work you already did.
author: Newt Gingrich

text: I have no special talents. I am only passionately curious.
author: Albert Einstein

text: If you’re going through hell, keep going.
author: Winston Churchill

text: The bitterness of poor quality remains long after the sweetness of low price is forgotten.
author: Benjamin Franklin

text: If you're not making a mistake, it's a mistake.
author: Miles Davis

text: You can’t build a reputation on what you are going to do.
author: Henry Ford

text: We are what we pretend to be, so we must be careful about what we pretend to be.
author: Kurt Vonnegut

text: Easy choices, hard life. Hard choices, easy life.
author: Jerzy Gregorek

text: It’s supposed to be hard. If it wasn’t hard, everyone would do it. The hard is what makes it great.
author: Jimmy

text: Commit yourself to today and secure a better tomorrow.
author: Unattributed

text: It costs nothing to teach something, and everything to learn.
author: The Lead Attorney

text: No such thing as a fight that can’t be lost.
author: Piccolo

text: Those who make peaceful resolution impossible make violent revolution inevitable.
author: John F. Kennedy

text: Your own strength keeps you alive. Everything you need is in you.
author: Unattributed

text: Courage truly shines only in the darkest depths of fear.
author: Unattributed

text: I don’t engage ignorance; you’re not entitled to uninformed opinions.
author: Unattributed

text: Life can be tough but the ride is worth it!
author: Unattributed

text: Never stop letting life grow you into a better person!
author: Unattributed

text: Always believe something great is going to happen to you!
author: Unattributed

text: I asked the stars what to do, they just shined.
author: Unattributed

text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: You were born an original, so don't die a copy.
author: John Mason

text: Success will only come to those who dare to attempt.
author: Unattributed

text: Life is difficult, choose your difficult before it chooses you.
author: Unattributed

text: Live the moment, cherish the experience and go for more!
author: Unattributed

text: If there can be no victory, then I'll fight forever.
author: Unattributed

text: A question opens the mind, a statement closes the mind.
author: Unattributed

text: Life is a game. When you lose, always choose continue.
author: Unattributed

text: Don’t laugh if unfunny. Don’t scratch if it don’t itch.
author: Unattributed

text: The hen pecks a cock and makes him a crow.
author: Lord Ichimonji

text: My favorite sort of problem is one that handles itself.
author: Vados

text: You can either make excuses or you make it work.
author: Unattributed

text: There’s nothing you can hold on to in this world.
author: Wudan Master

text: Life is like a circle; when something ends, another begins.
author: Stranger

text: Might is not one’s outer brawn, it’s their inner strength.
author: The Emperor

text: When we’re at our freest, we’re most susceptible to pain.
author: Jeff James

text: You never ask a fish how to catch a fish.
author: Unattributed

text: Everything ends, and we’re lost to the dust of time.
author: Unattributed

text: Time continues to pass us mercilessly; so many squander it.
author: Jinta

text: Be wary my child, for evil always finds a way.
author: The Emperor

text: Money and power corrupts, especially when it’s new to you.
author: Unattributed

text: When you fall, stand; hold your head two inches higher.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: If you run into trouble, walk out of it dignified.
author: Delenn

text: Death is not the enemy to life; death simply is.
author: Captain Montoya

text: Truth is a river; God is the mouth of the river.
author: G'Kar

text: Light isn’t the goal of the search, it’s the result.
author: G'Kar

text: It’s not necessary to know. It’s necessary only to try.
author: Lennier

text: Think in steps. Problems can’t be solved all at once.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: Life is hard. Can’t carry the load? Grow bigger shoulders.
author: Bo

text: People ignore things for convenience. Knowledge is always a burden.
author: Unattributed

text: You always have choices, and those choices always have consequences.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: Open your mind; slowly, dimly, you can begin to understand.
author: Neroon

text: People doubt good news but rarely question the bad news.
author: Unattributed

text: Teach others, then step aside and allow them to grow.
author: Lorien

text: Skepticism is the mind’s language; what does your heart say?
author: Lorien

text: Words create meaning. Names have power. Everything was created with words.
author: Unattributed

text: Entropy consumes everything. We all hit bottom sooner or later.
author: Mr. Garibaldi

text: Use time wisely; there’s infinite possibilities between tick and tock.
author: Lorien

text: Together, all our thoughts form the universe; they’ll always matter.
author: G'Kar

text: Greater than the death of flesh is death of hope.
author: G'Kar

text: I met myself and found out I didn’t like myself.
author: Dr. Stephen Franklin

text: Death is much more important to life than you know.
author: Unattributed

text: The war is never won; only new battles to conquer.
author: Delenn

text: You can keep lying to yourself, or you can get help.
author: Unattributed

text: Good news can wait. Bad news will refuse to leave.
author: Susan Ivanova

text: Everyone has to live with their own success or failure.
author: Unattributed

text: The burden of knowledge rests on the shoulders of learners.
author: Unattributed

text: All you need to succeed: direction, determination, patience, and strength.
author: Unattributed

text: Get rid of distractions. You can learn much from silence.
author: Unattributed

text: Life is good. Become something special before it’s too late.
author: Unattributed

text: You can’t deal with problems by pretending they don’t exist.
author: Unattributed

text: Forgiveness is a hard thing but something to strive for.
author: Father Theo

text: Where does revenge end and justice begin? Forgiveness is hard.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: Lesson Number One: A lack of information can kill you.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: Dreamers, shapers, singers, makers; part of me believes in magic.
author: Captain Sheridan

text: The answer lies within the question. Ask wisely; think deeply.
author: Unattributed

text: The darkest nights will always come before the brightest mornings.
author: Unattributed

text: We all have choices. The ones we make define us.
author: Unattributed

text: This time it really can be different; it has to.
author: Unattributed

text: Everything comes to an end. Just enjoy the happy moments.
author: Unattributed

text: Life is about lessons; don’t ever stop learning from it.
author: Unattributed

text: You learn something new every day if you pay attention.
author: Kylie W.

text: Doesn't matter how someone is born but how they grow.
author: Alberto S.

text: Hope is time, achieving is time, and becoming is time.
author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

text: To change: either see the light or feel the heat.
author: Tavis Smiley

text: If you don’t handle your business, business will handle you.
author: Tim Black

text: Feels like it rained in my head for 100 days.
author: Linkin Park

text: Progress does not roll in on the wheels of inevitability.
author: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

text: Life can be really challenging, so face it head on.
author: Unattributed

text: Hard work and resilience turn dreams into reality with discipline.
author: Unattributed

text: You feel so small, but stars are too from afar.
author: Unattributed

text: Life is too short to stress; make every second count.
author: Unattributed

text: Be patient with yourself. Nothing in nature blooms all year.
author: Unattributed

text: Having a goal without a plan is just a wish.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

text: In life, you prosper when you go your own speed.
author: Unattributed

text: Nothing is impossible; the world itself says I am possible.
author: Audrey Hepburn

text: Life is what you make of it; so make something!
author: Unattributed

text: Hate will never win, but pain can be your friend.
author: Unattributed

text: Better to start something late than never start at all.
author: Unattributed

text: Don’t let yourself hold you back from achieving your goals.
author: Unattributed

text: When dragons arise from darkness, fear can fuel your courage.
author: Unattributed

text: There’s no such conquering weapon as the necessity of conquering.
author: George Herbert

text: Have discipline today and enjoy the freedom it gives tomorrow.
author: Unattributed

text: Don't rush for gold; sell the shovel or the pan.
author: Unattributed

text: Blue pills yield red oceans; red pills yield blue oceans.
author: Theo WAF

text: People with red ocean mindset work more for much less.
author: Theo WAF

text: Don't downgrade yourself. Upgrade your mindset to match your vision.
author: Unattributed

text: Upskill; be a lifelong learner, stay relevant, and embrace change.

text: Minds are like books, easily read if you know how.
author: Master Roshi

text: Those who do not hear it will eventually feel it.
author: Unattributed

text: Close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades; nothing else.
author: Unattributed

text: What's real is family. Your family. Hold on to that.
author: Dom Toretto

text: Stand face to face and look it in the eye.
author: Unattributed

text: Never forget: All learning requires sacrifice and embarrassment; humble yourself.
author: Unattributed

text: Where we’re going, there are no roads; we build them.
author: Jules Williams

text: The difference between difficult and impossible is 10% more effort.
author: Theo WAF

text: You have to try. If you don’t, you simply fail.
author: Unattributed

text: Run faster than everyone else who’s running from the bear.
author: Unattributed

text: Better to try and fail than never try at all.
author: Unattributed

text: Use the cards you're given as if you chose them.
author: Ruby

text: Sacrifice for your dreams, or your dreams will be sacrificed.
author: Unknown

text: Dragons teach strength isn't destruction, it's mastering the fire within.
author: Unattributed

text: Most I made in gov was the least I made in private.
author: Jules Williams

text: Succeeded and no one cares. Fail and they all laugh.
author: Unattributed

text: Focus your mind. Distraction is the root of all failure.

text: It doesn’t matter what you’re going through; it will pass.
author: Unattributed

text: Everything you need is inside of you. Go find it.
author: Unattributed

text: Take everything 1% at a time and never give up.
author: Unattributed

text: Courage, strength, determination, all qualities required for you to succeed.
author: Unattributed

text: New things are scary, but it gets easier with time.

text: We must say goodbye before we can say hello again.
author: Grandpa Gohan

text: The truth is always upsetting when you live a lie.
author: Master Roshi

text: Fail forward, hold the line, and you will always prevail.
author: Unattributed

text: Listen to advice and accept discipline; you will become wise.
author: Proverbs

text: It’s sad when plans fail; you should have a backup.

text: There’s always a solution for every obstacle. Go find it.

text: Just because you can’t see results doesn’t mean nothing’s happening.
author: Unattributed

text: Ideas are easy. Execution is hard. Consistency is harder.
author: Unattributed

text: Learn to deal with imposter syndrome; it will show up.
author: Kevin Wilcox

text: Success is always a marathon. It is not a sprint!
author: Theo WAF

text: What I expect from you is to not give up.
author: Theo WAF

text: If you have a problem, you should ask for help.
author: Theo WAF

text: Always go back and help your brother who is struggling.
author: Theo WAF

text: You are the new story that someone needs to hear.
author: Theo WAF

text: Desperation leads to your collapse or it forces your evolution.
author: Breylon Lawrence-Williams

text: The best investment you can ever make is in yourself.
author: Unattributed

text: Your mindset is the most important factor in your success.
author: Unattributed

text: Success is simply hard work. With concentration, anything is possible.

text: When you quit, that’s the moment you decide to fail.
author: The Math Sorcerer

text: Our breath is the only thing that holds us together.
author: Unattributed

text: Doing hard work is YOUR job. Others can only help.
author: Kyle Ardill

text: Calmness is power, and positivity is wealth; both are choices.

text: A person who cannot control themselves cannot control their destiny.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Chase them, they run. Focus on yourself, they get curious.
author: Unattributed

text: Make preparations now. When you look up, it’ll be December.
author: David Dallas

text: Always remember the golden rule: perception is a great defense.

text: The most brutal weapons are the ones forged from within.

text: Every new day gives you another chance to be successful.
author: Christopher Webb

text: The dark places you’re in will eventually lead to light.
author: Unattributed

text: It’s okay to disappear until you feel like you again.
author: Unattributed

text: You got you here; every decision, every delay and denial.
author: Unattributed

text: The only time everything is ‘done’ is when you’re dead.
author: Unattributed

text: Love isn’t something you fall into. It’s something you choose.
author: Unattributed

text: If you’re not earning what you want, look inward first.
author: Unattributed

text: There’s always a choice, even if it’s a hard one.
author: Unattributed

text: The errors you make aren’t failures, they’re your best teachers.
author: Unattributed

text: Remember this: work hard, stay well, eat and sleep plenty.
author: Master Roshi

text: Pain is real. It teaches us things we’ll always remember.
author: Unattributed

text: Practice slow, you grow fast. Practice fast, you grow slow.
author: Unattributed

text: Technology people who understand business outperform those who don’t.
author: Paul Zikopoulos & Christopher Bienko

text: Don’t be an island; you’ll get swallowed by the waves.
author: Theo WAF

text: The weakest dog always barks loudest; there’s strength in silence.
author: Unattributed

text: It's a lot you have to remember. Just keep studying.
author: Yahshua Ball

text: A life of comfort won’t get you what you want.
author: Ed Wilson

text: We talk about what we don’t understand until we do.
author: Blk Muzlim

text: You have to finish what you started... you have to.
author: Jamila Huston

text: Your mind is a minefield; be careful what you think.
author: Nikhil Kapoor

text: Goals that feel impossible will become real when you practice.
author: Sherica Holman

text: Practice every day. Repetition is the heartbeat of your progress.
author: Sherica Holman

text: Excuses are the nails that build the house of failure.
author: Michael Churchill

text: Discipline weighs ounces; regret weighs tons. Be disciplined. Eliminate regret.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated every day.
author: Robert Collier

text: Success comes from preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
author: Colin Powell

text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
author: Bo Bennett

text: A dream becomes a goal when the dreamer takes action.
author: Bo Bennett

text: When the economy is down, they always come back around.
author: Somebody’s Grandpa

text: The greatest loss is what dies inside while still alive.
author: Norman Cousins

text: Frontend looks nice, but learning backend will get you paid.
author: Theo WAF

text: Help others. When one person teaches, two people are learning.
author: Paul Zikopoulos & Christopher Bienko

text: Great work. I knew you would get it right eventually.
author: Glorio

text: If it doesn’t challenge you, then it doesn’t change you.
author: Jennifer Lau

text: Constantly evolve and enjoy each day for what it is.
author: Izaya Orihara

text: Two choices: evolve or remain; stagnation is just slow decay.
author: Yahshua Ball

text: It's okay to struggle. You can always develop yourself.
author: Glenn Harrold

text: Change is the only constant. You evolve or fall behind.
author: Unattributed

text: Memory is like gravity... it just needs a little push.
author: Joker

text: What's done in the dark will come to the light.
author: Bible

text: Work in the shadows; emerge when it's time to shine.
author: Kirk Alton

text: The time to meditate is when you don't have time.
author: Sydney J. Harris

text: Open up your mind and let a thousand flowers bloom.
author: Mao Zedong

text: Kid: What's up in the clouds? — Cloud Engineer: A bunch of Linux servers.
author: Paul Zikopoulos & Christopher Bienko

text: The purpose of memory is to learn from your mistakes.
author: Unknown

text: A furious rampaging beast lives deep inside you. Release it.
author: Rei Kiriyama
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: Women may betray you, but gaining more pieces never will.
author: Okuyasu Yokomizo
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: Life is a game. Keep studying and clear the board!
author: Kirk Alton

text: A real professional can measure their ability with brutal precision.
author: Smith
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: Victory or defeat is never guaranteed before the match begins.
author: Smith
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: You have to keep on trying. That's all that matters.
author: Kai Shimada
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: When you fall, pick up the pieces and move on.
author: Rei Kiriyama
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: It's easier to do something than to worry about it.
author: Takashi Hayashida
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: Sometimes life fucks you over. You have to unfuck yourself.
author: Serge’s Drill Sergeant

text: Don't continue without fixing your errors. Go step by step.
author: Ross Agginie

text: Help others. When one person teaches, two people are learning.
author: Paul Zikopoulos & Christopher Bienko

text: The only way to get good at it is studying.
author: Kai Shimada
source: March Comes in Like a Lion

text: Silence is a good thing; it can make you think.
author: Unknown

text: Moscow rules, watch your back; London rules, cover your arse.
author: Diana Taverner

text: Not hope, but knowing hope kills you — that kills you.
author: Jackson Lamb

text: How you prepare for something determines how you finish it.
author: Bakari Williams

text: If fate doesn't make you laugh, then you just don't get the joke.
author: Karla

text: Fear and guilt are the dark angels that haunt rich men. Despair and humiliation haunt the poor.
author: Khader Bhai & Lin

text: Fate's way of beating us in a fair fight is to give us warnings that we hear, but never heed.
author: Lin

text: The only force more ruthless and cynical than the business of big politics is the politics of big business.
author: Didier

text: Sometimes the lion must roar, just to remind the horse of his fear.
author: Abdullah

text: If we can't respect the way we earn it, money has no value. If we can't use it to make life better for our families and loved ones, money has no purpose.
author: Lin
